name: Dubai
tagline: Zero Income Tax, World-Class Luxury, and Year-Round Sunshine
description: Dubai offers a unique FIRE proposition: zero income tax on your withdrawals combined with world-class infrastructure, safety, and connectivity. The city is a global hub with direct flights to virtually everywhere, a cosmopolitan expat community, and amenities that range from futuristic skyscrapers to pristine beaches. While the cost of living is higher than most FIRE destinations, the tax savings can offset this significantly for high-net-worth retirees.

quickFacts.visa: Multiple residency options: 10-year Golden Visa for property investment (AED 2M+), 5-year retirement visa (requirements apply), or freelancer/remote work visas
quickFacts.language: Arabic (official); English is the lingua franca and widely spoken everywhere
quickFacts.safetyRating: Very High – one of the safest cities in the world; extremely low crime
quickFacts.nearestAirport: Dubai International Airport (DXB) – world's busiest international airport
quickFacts.climate: Hot desert with very hot, humid summers (40°C+) and mild, pleasant winters

housing.description: Studio or small 1BR apartment in International City, Discovery Gardens, or Al Nahda

dining.description: Shawarma spots, Indian restaurants, and food courts 3x/week; cooking at home otherwise

healthcare.description: Basic mandatory health insurance; limited coverage, higher co-pays

transportation.description: Dubai Metro and bus system; occasional taxi; no car at this budget

entertainment.description: Beach access (free), mall walking, community events; very limited nightlife budget

1M.lifestyle: Dubai on $1M is a challenge and not what most people envision when they think of the city. You will live in a basic apartment in an outer neighborhood, rely on public transit, and eat at the excellent but modest Indian and Pakistani restaurants that serve the city's working population. The beach is free and gorgeous, but the glitzy Dubai lifestyle is out of reach. The zero income tax advantage is minimal at this withdrawal level.

housing.description: 1BR apartment in Dubai Marina, JLT, or Business Bay with city or partial marina views

dining.description: Mid-range dining 3-4x/week; enjoying Dubai's diverse international restaurant scene

healthcare.description: Comprehensive health insurance with good hospital network and reasonable deductibles

transportation.description: Compact car rental or owned vehicle, fuel, Salik tolls, parking, insurance

entertainment.description: Beach clubs on occasion, gym membership, desert trips, cinema, brunches

2M.lifestyle: At $2M, Dubai starts to make sense. You can afford a modern apartment in one of the desirable marina-area communities, drive your own car, and enjoy the city's incredible diversity of cuisines. Weekend brunches -- a Dubai institution -- are within reach, and you can join the beach-club scene occasionally. Zero income tax means your full $6,667 monthly withdrawal is yours to spend.

housing.description: Spacious 2BR in Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, or Downtown Dubai with stunning views

dining.description: Regular dining at celebrity-chef restaurants, Friday brunches at 5-star hotels

healthcare.description: Premium health insurance with access to top hospitals like Mediclinic and Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi

transportation.description: Mid-range SUV (Nissan Patrol or similar), full insurance, fuel, tolls

entertainment.description: Beach club memberships, desert safaris, golf, spa treatments, live events at Dubai Opera

3M.lifestyle: This is the Dubai life that draws people from around the world. A beautiful apartment overlooking the marina or Burj Khalifa, regular dining at restaurants by Nobu and Zuma, Friday brunches at five-star hotels, and beach club memberships for the winter months. The zero-tax advantage at $10K per month saves you thousands annually compared to most US or European cities.

housing.description: Luxury 3BR penthouse in Downtown Dubai, or a villa on Palm Jumeirah with private beach

dining.description: Fine dining at Michelin-starred restaurants multiple times per week, catered dinner parties

healthcare.description: VIP health insurance with direct access to top specialists, executive wellness programs

transportation.description: Luxury vehicle (Mercedes, Range Rover), premium insurance, private driver for events

entertainment.description: Premium beach and yacht clubs, golf at Emirates Golf Club, VIP event access, spa retreats

domesticHelp.description: Full-time live-in maid, regular deep cleaning service, driver on call

luxuryExtras.description: Yacht charter weekends, first-class travel, designer shopping, Maldives getaways

5M.lifestyle: Dubai at $5M is where the city truly shines. A Palm Jumeirah villa with private beach access, a luxury car, a live-in maid, VIP everything, and the freedom to jet off to the Maldives or Europe on a whim. Zero income tax on your $16,667 monthly withdrawal means you keep every dirham. This is the cosmopolitan luxury lifestyle Dubai was built for.

housing.description: Ultra-luxury villa on Palm Jumeirah, Emirates Hills estate, or Jumeirah Bay Island residence

dining.description: Personal chef, exclusive dining at the world's best restaurants, private events on yachts

healthcare.description: Royal-tier health coverage, executive wellness, international medical access, anti-aging clinics

transportation.description: Multiple luxury and exotic vehicles, full-time chauffeur, helicopter transfers available

entertainment.description: Exclusive club memberships, yacht ownership, art collecting, Dubai World Cup VIP, philanthropy

domesticHelp.description: Full household staff: housekeeper, chef, nanny/PA, driver, gardener, pool maintenance

luxuryExtras.description: Private yacht, exotic car collection, first-class global travel, art gallery, real estate portfolio

10M.lifestyle: At $10M, Dubai delivers a lifestyle that few cities on Earth can match. An Emirates Hills estate, a private yacht, exotic cars, a full household staff, and access to the most exclusive experiences in the region. With zero income tax, every cent of your $33,333 monthly withdrawal is yours. Dubai's position as a global hub means London, Mumbai, and Singapore are all a direct flight away.
